rebuild_note: Clean-slate redeploy 2026-05-27. Old factory/router/zap/megazap/unzap/gateway/lens archived. New stack: consolidated FissionPeriphery (2-tx Buy/Sell) + new SY adapter (max_auto_assoc=-1, NPM pre-approved) + new FissionRewardsMarket (operator pattern).

periphery.notes: Periphery v3: audit pass-2 fixes (X-3 per-side _checkSize, X-4 remove quoteUnzapSy, X-5 protectedToken rescue gate, X-6 NPM fee cap 100 HBAR, X-8 delete dead deadline check, X-9 buySyForLp delta-only). Same source file.

periphery_v2_abandoned.reason: Superseded by Periphery v3 after audit pass-2.

periphery_v1_abandoned.reason: Superseded by Periphery v2; never v3.

sy_saucer_v2_lp.notes: SaucerSwapLPYieldSource v2 (X-2 fix): adds sweepHbar() so stuck NPM-refund HBAR is recoverable. Same source file. Old SY at 0x...a02585 abandoned.

sy_saucer_v2_lp_v1_abandoned.reason: X-2 fix needed admin sweepHbar; v1 immutable. Superseded by 0x...a0289a.

markets.notes: Correct 8% APY anchor (anchor = exp(ln(1.08) * timeToExpiry/yearSec)). Live since 2026-05-28.

markets_archived.reason: anchor=1.2e18 misconfigured (20% APY); rebalance attempts drove rate to 141%. Replaced 2026-05-28.
First fix attempt: anchor=1.08e18 was a per-year factor (not annualized), produced 37% APY. Replaced same day with correct formula.
Superseded by v3 market 0xfd33ccb2... after X-2 SY adapter fix
